creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187081
SVN patch

Hi,

Latest version of radare2 is 1.6.0, but there is port only for 1.0.2. Radare2 team are very friendly and supports FreeBSD, except ino64 update. That's why porting of new version was easy. I'll send patch for ino64 to upstream soon.

This patch update port to 1.6.0. SVN diff has been attached to ticket. It works for me, I use it for my FreeBSD-mips hobby very often.
